globalNews.title: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship
globalNews.summary: Iran accuses the US of violating their deal and says it struck targets linked to American forces in response.

globalNews.title: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as international rescue teams arrive
globalNews.summary: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as families desperate for news.

globalNews.title: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
globalNews.summary: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 920 people.

globalNews.title: Meloni and Trump: A very public fall-out that is proving very hard to fix
globalNews.summary: Italy's PM was not long ago being called the "Trump whisperer", but their relationship has gone from public attacks to personal insults.

globalNews.title: Europe's deadly heatwave breaks German record and halts public events
globalNews.summary: Germany's highest ever temperature of 41.3C is recorded provisionally in Saarbrücken, over the border from France.

cryptoNews.title: SecondFi targets two-week recovery after Cardano wallet exploit
cryptoNews.summary: SecondFi says it has completed forensic investigations, taken a final balance snapshot and is preparing to return assets.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: EU lawmakers urge assessing DeFi, staking, NFT regulation
cryptoNews.summary: The nonbinding report outlines Parliament's vision for future EU crypto regulation and warns against national MiCA rules.

cryptoNews.title: Securitize expects to raise $400M ahead of public debut
cryptoNews.summary: Securitize says less than 30% of shareholders in the acquisition firm taking it public elected to redeem, giving it an expected $400 million on its upcoming debut.

cryptoNews.title: SOL reclaims $72, but onchain data flags weakening momentum
cryptoNews.summary: Solana found strength from tokenized stock trading on its network, but a declining TVL and DEX volumes point to fading momentum.

aiNews.title: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.
aiNews.summary: When confronted with cancer, Connor Christou fed everything tied tied to his regime — blood results, scan data, wearable output, journal entries — into Claude.

aiNews.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
aiNews.summary: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

aiNews.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic  Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
aiNews.summary: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.

aiNews.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm

aiNews.title: OpenAI poaches Uber India chief to lead its biggest market outside the US
aiNews.summary: The hire marks OpenAI's latest push into India, expanding offices, partnerships and hiring.
